brief: The arrest of the Tate brothers and Trump's subpoena controversies dominate US news, while France evacuates 20,000 due to wildfires. In tech, Claude's voice mode expands and Patreon lays off 20% of staff. The Fields Medal awards highlight achievements in mathematics.
news_summary: The Tate brothers lose right-wing support after arrest, Trump drops subpoena for Jewish student groups, and France faces major wildfires. Other stories include the Fields Medals, ICE detention expansion, and US-Saudi nuclear deal conditions.
papers_summary: New papers cover clinical assay workflow optimization with AI, a task taxonomy for edge bundling in visualization, and ethical perspectives on generative AI for dementia care. Also, a benchmark for multimodal LLMs in interface construction.

en.brief: The arrest of the Tate brothers and Trump's subpoena controversies dominate US news, while France evacuates 20,000 due to wildfires. In tech, Claude's voice mode expands and Patreon lays off 20% of staff. The Fields Medal awards highlight achievements in mathematics.
en.news_summary: The Tate brothers lose right-wing support after arrest, Trump drops subpoena for Jewish student groups, and France faces major wildfires. Other stories include the Fields Medals, ICE detention expansion, and US-Saudi nuclear deal conditions.
en.papers_summary: New papers cover clinical assay workflow optimization with AI, a task taxonomy for edge bundling in visualization, and ethical perspectives on generative AI for dementia care. Also, a benchmark for multimodal LLMs in interface construction.

zh.brief: 今日重點包括香港前議員胡志偉在英國機場被扣留、台灣收緊陸配參選資格、美國與沙特核協議引發核擴散擔憂，以及施南生逝世。學術方面多篇關於AI與可視化的研究發表。
zh.news_summary: 香港民主派前議員胡志偉在倫敦希斯羅機場被扣留後獲准入英；台灣新規要求陸配「除籍滿十年」方可參選，引發兩岸爭議；美國與沙特簽署核協議，專家憂加劇中東核擴散；英國女子誣告強姦被判刑；TikTok直播帶貨在英國興起；華語電影製片施南生病逝。
zh.papers_summary: 多篇arXiv論文探討AI臨床工作流程優化、邊緣捆綁任務分類、多模態大語言模型基準測試，以及生成式AI在失智症護理中的倫理考量。
